text:
eye-water is the 3rd track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title refers to tears.

Musical motifs

The track has 3 remixes:

進撃gt20130218巨人 
Call of Silence
Call your name 

The track incorporates the Call your name's bridge motif at (1:45-2:16).

Sometimes, only the jittery synth effects (2.30-2:35) are used.
